mapper.select:
SELECT f.id as fava_id, f.type as fava_type, c.id as g_id, c.title as g_title, c.cover as g_cover, 'course' as g_type, '可试看' as g_try FROM osh_fava f INNER JOIN osh_course c ON f.goods_id = c.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.type = 'course'
UNION ALL
SELECT f.id as fava_id, f.type as fava_type, col.id as g_id, col.title as g_title, col.cover as g_cover, 'column' as g_type, '' as g_try FROM osh_fava f INNER JOIN osh_column col ON f.goods_id = col.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.type = 'column'
UNION ALL
SELECT f.id as fava_id, f.type as fava_type, b.id as g_id, b.title as g_title, b.cover as g_cover, 'book' as g_type, '' as g_try FROM osh_fava f INNER JOIN osh_book b ON f.goods_id = b.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.type = 'book'
ORDER BY fava_id DESC
SELECT count(1) FROM osh_fava WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId} AND type = #{type}
mapper.insert: insert into osh_fava( user_id, goods_id, type, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{type}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from osh_fava where user_id = #{userId} and goods_id = #{goodsId} and type = #{type}
